item.name: Lavandin Remora
item.description:
Often confused with the similarly named lavender remora, but considering that they both taste more or less the same, this is little cause for concern.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: A subspecies of lavender remora common to the waters off the coast of La Noscea. The result of crossbreeding with other, closely related wavekin, this remora variant owes its name to a hybrid of the lavender plant.
